summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 2D embedding plane with 6 word-vector dots (king, queen, man, woman, prince, princess). Phase 1 ValueTracker t_tr grows 3 parallel arrows man→king (BLUE), woman→queen (RED), prince→+(king-man) (BLUE_D) showing the 'gender direction' is consistent. Phase 2 animates a YELLOW dot along king - man + woman ending near queen.
